title: Jungle Book
desc: Mowgli, a young boy, is raised in the jungle by wolves. He has two loyal friends, Bagheera, a panther, and Baloo, a bear, who safeguard him from Shere Khan, a Bengal tiger, who wants to devour Mowgli.
